title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.770 - Reports by superintendents of state schools for deaf and blind required, when
text:
162.770.  Reports by superintendents of state schools for deaf and blind required, when. — The superintendents of the Missouri School for the Blind and the Missouri School for the Deaf shall transmit to the state board of education reports containing information that the board desires.
(L. 1973 H.B. 474 § 23) 
Effective 7-1-74
